last_success_patterns.summary: Updated in this task: due periodic checkpoints remain runner-owned command evidence, but goal progression is now blocked by the single self-improvement loop certificate until a completed runtime, session maintenance, and full readiness/source-package/public-check/release evidence are current.

Updated in this task: auto-improve-goal-status and auto-improve-goal-finalize still materialize run artifacts, and goal-runtime-certificate now keeps run_artifacts.status=clean separate from blockers for incomplete runtime/session/command evidence.

Updated in this task: goal-runtime-certificate reports runner_audit_current=false for status-only artifacts. Report-only artifacts can remain run_artifacts.status=clean, but command observability now blocks until runner-origin command evidence exists.

Automated on 2026-05-17 by making starter-bundle planning validation skip runtime-event appends for placeholder run ids and adding a regression that default starter-bundle validation emits no JSONL runtime events. Focused planning/template tests passed and git diff -- runs stayed clean after validation.
